mapper.sql: id, client_order_id, user_id, account_id, stock_code, exchange, side, order_type, order_amount, order_quantity, est_quantity, held_amount, price, status, source, round_id, batch_id, currency, fail_reason, requested_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (client_order_id, user_id, account_id, stock_code, exchange, side, order_type, order_amount, order_quantity, est_quantity, held_amount, price, status, source, round_id, batch_id, currency, fail_reason, requested_at) VALUES (#{clientOrderId}, #{userId}, #{accountId}, #{stockCode}, #{exchange}, #{side}, #{orderType}, #{orderAmount}, #{orderQuantity}, #{estQuantity}, #{heldAmount}, #{price}, #{status}, #{source}, #{roundId}, #{batchId}, #{currency}, #{failReason}, #{requestedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = 'FILLED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENT'
UPDATE orders SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'QUEUED') ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM orders WHERE round_id = #{roundId} AND status = 'QUEUED' ORDER BY id
